page_metadata.biotools__summary:
Welcome to the mmannot Web page.

For instance, suppose that you have sequenced your organism of interest with sRNA-Seq (RNA-Seq works too), and you want to know how many times you have sequenced miRNAs, rRNAs, tRNAs, etc. This is what mmannot does.
